calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Nov-04-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Susan Jewel for Bettina Balunstat.

The Court stated that everything had been cured except one issue; the real property. Ms. Jewel requested that the Court grant the part that indicated that the house was gifted and stated that they would probate the other half. The Court granted the petition (an order for the same was signed in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-14-2009 Continued To Nov-04-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-23-2009 Continued To Oct-14-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
